feedback.text: Dear digital Fairness Act, A simple request if not mandatory requirement that should come with a game,especially physical ones on a disc,just make sure the game works even after the online part stopped working cause the server has been taken down,best example i can give is gran turismo sport on the playstation 4,the game it's servers are offline but to this day the game still functions and can be purchased and played as intended and in that respect other games should follow the same care taken after the server goes down,it's just weird that something you spend money on isn't yours to keep,i find it really strange it's a license instead of data on a disc/digital they sell you,just odd to me,just make it work for however long the disc or data lasts!
